evidence_refs.claim: Decision logs should include enough information for audit/offline debugging and API decisions include decision_id when logging is enabled.
Events require stable names and structured attributes; event names uniquely identify event structure.
title, description, and default are annotations, not enforcement.

policy_basis.claim: canonical envelope includes decision_id/input/result/timestamp-style fields for audit
record identity uses stable event-style id/source/type concepts

reasons: COOL_6 plan converted from narrative wiring plan to executable registry.
Only gates with existing entrypoints are enabled.
P0A and P0PY remain deferred to their dedicated later stages rather than enabled prematurely.
Legacy memory sync validation is retired in favor of session-state export validation.
